name: RPlog_Squid_Lake_Final_Plans
title: Fueling the Fire on Dac
summary: In a Quarren-owned safehouse in the undersea city of Aquarius on Dac, the disguised ISB Director Korynn Fleming, operating as the stranded spacer HJek Pathon, finalizes the plot to ignite a Quarren-Mon Calamari civil war. His agent McKenna, posing as the Sarian Antar Evoros, delivers surveillance files on a Quarren diplomat named Eeth Mentel, and a newly arrived Imperial combat medic, Chief Petty Officer Calyx Drogyn, slips in under cover as a Republic-citizen paramedic. Korynn lays out the scheme: manipulate Mentel into publicly siding with his people, invoke the historical traitor-Senator Tikkes to inflame old grievances, and fuel riots until they cannot be quelled. Calyx proposes contaminating the Quarren bacta and kelp supply to provoke unrest while staging aid stations that double as revolutionary supply caches, and the three debate involving smugglers versus keeping all Imperial ties hidden. Korynn agrees that obscuring Imperial involvement will leave the rebels with only their own people to blame, assigns each man his cover and tasks, and sets them to making Quarren friends and stoking the coming war.
